summary:
The issue was that when `EnableMetrics` was set to true in the configuration, the `Metrics` object could be nil or missing necessary defaults, causing the status endpoint to fail when referencing metrics data. I updated `config.go` so that during configuration loading we ensure the `Metrics` struct is initialized and populated with sensible defaults (endpoint `/metrics` and interval 60 seconds) whenever metrics are enabled. After making this change, `test.sh` runs successfully:

```
PASS: Server starts and responds correctly with metrics enabled
2026/04/02 03:36:53 server starting on :8080
```

Let me know if you need anything else!
